com.pax.poslink.entity

Class FleetCardRequest

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCardRequest

  • public class FleetCardRequest
extends java.lang.Object
    Class FleetCardRequest.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    • Field Detail

      • Odometer

        public java.lang.String Odometer
        Reading from the cardholder’s vehicle odometer. Indicates the total number of miles the vehicle has travelled. Required by most fleet cards. If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans…16

      • VehicleNo

        @Deprecated
public java.lang.String VehicleNo
        Deprecated. 
        Deprecated. Also called “Vehicle Card Number”, “Purchase Device Sequence Number”, “Purchase Dev Seq”, or “PDSN”.
        The cardholder’s vehicle number or purchase device sequence number.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        Value is printed onto applicable cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans...20

      • VehicleNumber

        public java.lang.String VehicleNumber
        Also called “Vehicle Card Number”, “Purchase Device Sequence Number”, “Purchase Dev Seq”, or “PDSN”.
        The cardholder’s vehicle number or purchase device sequence number.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        Value is printed onto applicable cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans...20

      • JobNo

        @Deprecated
public java.lang.String JobNo
        Deprecated. 
        Deprecated. The cardholder’s job number.
        This field is separate from “Job ID” and is not currently required for any supported fleet card.
        However, BroadPOS may still send this data to supporting hosts.

        Attribute: ans...20

      • JobNumber

        public java.lang.String JobNumber
        The cardholder’s job number.
        This field is separate from “Job ID” and is not currently required for any supported fleet card.
        However, BroadPOS may still send this data to supporting hosts.

        Attribute: ans...20

      • DriverId

        public java.lang.String DriverId
        Also called “Driver Number”.
        The cardholder’s driver ID.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans…20

      • EmployeeNo

        @Deprecated
public java.lang.String EmployeeNo
        Deprecated. 
        Deprecated. Also called “Fleet Employee Number”.
        The cardholder’s employee number.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans...20

      • EmployeeNumber

        public java.lang.String EmployeeNumber
        Also called “Fleet Employee Number”.
        The cardholder’s employee number.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans...20

      • LicenseNo

        @Deprecated
public java.lang.String LicenseNo
        Deprecated. 
        Deprecated. The cardholder’s driver’s license number.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans...20

      • LicenseNumber

        public java.lang.String LicenseNumber
        The cardholder’s driver’s license number.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans...20

      • JobId

        public java.lang.String JobId
        The cardholder’s current job ID. This field is separate from the field named “Job Number”.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans…24

      • DepartmentNo

        @Deprecated
public java.lang.String DepartmentNo
        Deprecated. 
        Deprecated.The cardholder’s department number.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans...24

      • DepartmentNumber

        public java.lang.String DepartmentNumber
        The cardholder’s department number.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans...24

      • CustomerData

        public java.lang.String CustomerData
        Generic fleet customer data.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans...24

      • UserId

        public java.lang.String UserId
        Also called “Generic ID” or “Unencrypted ID Number”.
        The cardholder’s fleet ID. Required by certain fleet cards.
        Typically, hosts accept both Driver ID and Vehicle ID values for this field.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans...24

      • VehicleId

        public java.lang.String VehicleId
        The cardholder’s vehicle ID.
        This field is separate from the field named “Vehicle Number”.
        Required by certain fleet cards. If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans…16

      • FleetPromptCode

        public java.lang.String FleetPromptCode
        Determines the prompts shown during manually entered Wright Express (WEX) card fleet transactions.
        Value is printed onto applicable cards. If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.
        See Appendix B: WEX Fleet Prompt Codes and for valid values.

        Attribute: n2

      • VehicleUsageCode

        public java.lang.String VehicleUsageCode
        The vehicle usage code in fleet transactions.
        It’s essential identifier used to categorize and track the purpose and type of vehicle activities within a fleet management system.
        0-private
        1-business

        Attribute: n1

      • Hubometer

        public java.lang.String Hubometer
        Reading from the cardholder’s vehicle or trailer hubometer.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans…15

      • MainTenanceId

        public java.lang.String MainTenanceId
        The cardholder’s maintenance ID.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans…15

      • FleetPoNumber

        public java.lang.String FleetPoNumber
        Also called “Contract Number”.
        The cardholder’s current contract or purchase order (PO) number.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans…10

      • ReeferHours

        public java.lang.String ReeferHours
        Also called “Trailer Hours”.
        Reading from the cardholder’s reefer trailer engine meter.
        Indicates the total number of hours which the reefer engine has ran.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans…7

      • RestrictionCode

        public java.lang.String RestrictionCode
        Determines the prompts shown and purchase restrictions applied during manually entered Voyager fleet transactions.
        Value is printed onto applicable cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: n2

      • TrailerId

        public java.lang.String TrailerId
        Also called “Trailer Number” or “Trailer License Number”.
        The cardholder’s vehicle trailer ID or trailer license number.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans…10

      • TripNumber

        public java.lang.String TripNumber
        The number identifying the cardholder’s current trip.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans…15

      • UnitId

        public java.lang.String UnitId
        Also called “Unit Number”.
        The cardholder’s vehicle unit number.
        Required by certain fleet cards.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans…10

      • AdditionalFleetData1

        public java.lang.String AdditionalFleetData1
        Additional cardholder fleet data field reserved for forward compatibility.
        Applicable to Visa Fleet 2.0 cards only.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans…20

      • AdditionalFleetData2

        public java.lang.String AdditionalFleetData2
        More additional cardholder fleet data field reserved for forward compatibility.
        Applicable to Visa Fleet 2.0 cards only.
        If this field is required and not set, the application will prompt for it.

        Attribute: ans…20

      • FleetCardRequest

        public FleetCardRequest()
